description: You are an Instructional Coordinator evaluating educational technology for school district adoption. Audit Khan Academy (https://www.khanacademy.org), Coursera (https://www.coursera.org), and MIT OpenCourseWare (https://ocw.mit.edu) to assess their Performance and Accessibility scores using the Lighthouse tool. Create a professional report at /home/ga/Desktop/lighthouse_audit_report.txt that includes the name and URL of each site, the Performance and Accessibility scores obtained for each, and a brief recommendation on whether the site is technically suitable for adoption based on these scores.
